---
title: "CU/composite escapement estimates for package-first SPSR intake"
published_date: 2026-03-17
updated_date: 2026-03-19
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Use this page as an **orientation note only**.

::: {.callout-important}
The operational source of truth for the CU/composite escapement workflow now
lives in [`dfo-pacific-science/cu-escapement-data-cookbook`](https://github.com/dfo-pacific-science/cu-escapement-data-cookbook).

The FADS Open Science Hub keeps surrounding reference docs and links, but it is
**not** the working cookbook home.
:::

## Use the cookbook repo for the actual workflow

Go there when you need to:

- follow the maintained CU/composite processing recipe,
- run the SPSR package pre-flight helper,
- update the package-first handoff pattern,
- keep the operational cookbook in one place.

## Short path

1. Build the canonical CU/WSP bundle in the cookbook/species-prep flow.
2. If you need an SPSR handoff, run the cookbook repo pre-flight helper against the Salmon Data Package.
3. Derive wizard or bulk upload files from that validated package.

## Reference pages that still live here

- [Salmon data package specification](../reference_info/data_standards/salmon-data-exchange-package.qmd)
- [Salmon data package + SPSR intake path](../reference_info/data_standards/ontology-data-package-gpt.qmd)
- [FSAR Data Standardization Workflow](../how_to_guides/fsar-data-standardization-workflow.qmd)
- [FSAR to SPSR: End-to-End Example](../how_to_guides/fsar-to-spsr-end-to-end-example.qmd)
